title: Add blur effect to hero background image for better text visibility

requirements.summary: Apply blur effect to hero section background image to improve yellow text visibility
acceptanceCriteria: The hero section background image has a visible blur effect applied
The yellow text remains clearly readable and stands out against the blurred background
The blur effect is subtle enough to maintain visual appeal while improving text contrast
The effect is applied using CSS techniques (backdrop-filter or filter property on the background layer)

file_operations.description: Apply a blur effect to the hero section background image layer using CSS filter or backdrop-filter to improve text contrast. Adjust the background image rendering so that the blur is applied to the image while keeping the yellow hero text (heading 'Pureblend Spice Private Limited', tagline 'Pure Taste. Pure Health. Pureblend.', and description paragraphs) sharp and readable. Use a subtle blur value (e.g., blur(4px) to blur(8px)) to maintain visual appeal. Ensure the existing yellow text color, text shadows, layout structure, and animated scroll indicator remain unchanged.
